label: Onlook: direct visual edits written back to a REAL local codebase + tokens panel (strongest T1 instance, closest to CLI skills)

Uizard: screenshot/sketch->UI + theme swap (T8 image-brief OVERLAP; theme-swap=SKIP for anti-default)

tweakcn: visual shadcn token editor -> exports CSS vars (T7 token-export OVERLAP)
Every adopted idea must pass the anti-default mandate and be hostable by a lean CLI skill (no platform/backend/plugin/hosted-canvas)

direction: No new theme beyond T1-T8; discovery saturated at 4 additional tools with 0 new themes
